definitions: vt. 扰乱；打乱；破坏（平衡、秩序、生态等）

examples.text: Another problem is that agricultural wastes include fertilizers which stimulate increases in plant growth in the lagoons and upset the ecology of the area,
examples.explanation: 这里的 upset 是动词，意思是“扰乱、破坏”。upset the ecology of the area 表示“破坏该地区的生态平衡”。整句在说：农业废弃物中的化肥会刺激泻湖中植物增长，从而扰乱当地生态。
